docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAJANI, MUNZER AS TO DEFENDANT HOME DEPOT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-18-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE FREDRICKS. PLAINTIFF MUNZER DAJANI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HOME DEPOT IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOHN BALLENGER HDIS SALES MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DAJANI, MUNZER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HOME DEPOT JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT V. PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
